Fix: 

Change text
     With the exception of options -I, -g, -n and -o, the ls utility conforms
     to IEEE Std 1003.1-2001 (``POSIX.1'').
To
     With the exception of options -A, -I, -g, -n and -o, the ls utility conforms
     to IEEE Std 1003.1-2001 (``POSIX.1'').
